items.title: Landry Shamet was a really important part of the Knicks' title team.
items.author: Tommy Beer
items.body_excerpt:
Landry Shamet was a really important part of the Knicks' title team.

Not only the court (and on both ends of the floor), but in the locker room.

Well done by Leon and company bringing him back

items.title: The Timberwolves are declining Julian Phillips's team option per Jon Krawczynski of the Athletic
items.author: Ryan Eichten
items.body_excerpt:
The Timberwolves are declining Julian Phillips's team option per Jon Krawczynski of the Athletic

The Wolves open up a roster spot by letting go of a player set to make about $50,000 below the league minimum

They now have 3 open roster spots they will need to fill and about $8 million to do it

items.title: Sources: The Milwaukee Bucks declined to tender Ousmane Dieng a qualifying offer, which will make him an unrestricted free agent. Bucks have significant interest in re-signing Dieng in free agency. He averaged 11.0 points, 4.6 rebounds and 3.6 assists last season for Milwaukee.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Sources: The Milwaukee Bucks declined to tender Ousmane Dieng a qualifying offer, which will make him an unrestricted free agent. Bucks have significant interest in re-signing Dieng in free agency. He averaged 11.0 points, 4.6 rebounds and 3.6 assists last season for Milwaukee.

items.title: Portland was a team I’d mentioned in my trade column a few weeks ago and again on Memphis radio today. There hadn’t been reporting about their interest but I thought it made some sense. Morant’s value was such that they couldn’t get a real “asset” for him, but didn’t give up one.
items.author: Chris Herrington
items.body_excerpt: Portland was a team I’d mentioned in my trade column a few weeks ago and again on Memphis radio today. There hadn’t been reporting about their interest but I thought it made some sense. Morant’s value was such that they couldn’t get a real “asset” for him, but didn’t give up one.

items.title: This was the Memphis' Grizzlies starting lineup a few years back. All are gone now, with only 1 playoffs series won:
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
This was the Memphis' Grizzlies starting lineup a few years back. All are gone now, with only 1 playoffs series won:

Ja Morant
Desmond Bane
Dillon Brooks
Jaren Jackson Jr.
Steven Adams

Ja Morant: "I'm fine in the West."

(via Evan Sidery)

items.title: Utah Jazz cap situation after re-signing Jusuf Nurkic and declining Bez Mbeng & Hayden Gray.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Utah Jazz cap situation after re-signing Jusuf Nurkic and declining Bez Mbeng & Hayden Gray.

They project with $38.5 million under the luxury tax to re-sign Walker Kessler and use the $15 million mid-level exception.

They could create more room by trading/waiving some players.

items.title: The Thunder reduce their luxury tax penalty by $40 million by declining Kenrich Williams' $7.2 million team option. They could re-sign him with Bird rights.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
The Thunder reduce their luxury tax penalty by $40 million by declining Kenrich Williams' $7.2 million team option. They could re-sign him with Bird rights.

They are now just $7.6 million above the second apron, down from $39 million at the start of the offseason.
